titleStmt.title: SII 10.89: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 89. (A.R. No. 441 of 1915.) ON THE NĀGA SLAB SET UP NEAR THE SHRINE OF VINĀYAKA, TUBADU, NARASARAOPETA TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1054.

summary.p: States that Kāpe[ya]-Nāyaka, a general of Maṇḍarāju made a gift of 100 puṭṭis of land to god Bhīmēśvara of Dūṁbaṟuta and gives details of the distribution of the land among the several servants of the temple. The latter portion says that Kāpe[ya]-Nāyaka consecrated the image of Mahēśvara at Dūṁbaṟuta, built a temple for it and endowed it with 100 puṭṭis of land. Probably both the gifts are identical.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīsahituṁḍu dūṁbaṟiti su
śāsanuṁ ḍaniyankabhīmucakramu
līlāvāsuṁḍu satu¨rtthakulagirikēsa
ri gāpaṁḍu jagajjigīṣuṁḍu pē¨rmmini . [1 .*]
Aḍapayu naṁddalaṁbu vividhātapavā
raṇakāhaḷāvaliṁ baḍiyamu nādigā
ṁgala nripālakacihnalu buddhava¨rmmacēṁ ba
ḍasinavāḍu nāyakasabhāmaṇasiddapa
nāyakāṁkuṁ ḍippuḍamiṁ dadīyavīrabha
ṭapuṁggavumanumaṁ ḍudāttasaṁppadanu . [2 .*]
sēvaniyu siṁganayu jagadēvaṁḍuṁjōḍla
nuṁjūḍa dīrika maṁḍakṣmāvalayēśva
ru panpunaṁ bāvani raghunāthucētaṁ ba
nivaḍinakriyanu . [3 .*] tannaggiṁcucu neṟṟa
maṁḍaṇḍu budhādhāruṁḍu vanpaṁga nammannē
ṭaṁ ganayaṁbulanripulaku nmā¨rppeṭṭi yōḍi
ṁcci pē¨rkonna nmaṇḍanagaṁdhavāraṇasamākhyu
ṁ jēsi tūṁbaṟtipai nenna nvrittiga nātukū
ru dayatō nicce nnijasvāmiyunu . [4 .*]

śakasamasaṁkhya vārinidhisāyakakhēṁdu
mitaṁbugāṁga gā¨rttika sitapakṣatērasa
muṁ dīvrakarāhnamunaṁ dakhaṁḍadīpakamu
nu sītikhaṁḍuvulu bhātiga vrittiyu ca
ṁdrasū¨ryyatārakamuga nrityavādyamu
lu rāgamuṁ gūḍaṁga nicce śūlikini . [5 .*]
svasti śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1054 gu
nēṇṭi kā¨rttikaśuddha trayōdaśiyu nādi
vāramunāṁḍu śrīmatkāpenāyakuṁḍu
dūṁbaṟuta śrībhīmēśvaradēvaraku bhōgā¨rttha
mugāṁ beṭṭina polamu khaṁḍuvulu 100 vīni
lōna . Idēvara nivēdyamu kha 4 stānapatimā
dhavuni kha 3 naṭṭavula kēte kha 6 ma¨rttu 1 madda lyakāṟi
ddaṟaku kha 6 pāḍiEḍani kha 3
ripōtenāga kha 3 pōtāsāni prōliki kha 3 kāpā
sāniravva kha 3 manave vennaka kha 3 vēpesīlaka kha 3
paḍālu kommesūra kha 3 dēvāṁḍi nāga kha sthā
napatikaṁṭajiya kha 3
Ī kaṁbhamu sēsi yakṣaramulu vrāsina kannā cā
¨ryyuni kha 2 Adda 1 pāḍivāni kha 3 mē
lunāyakadēvāṁḍi kha 1 na 1 Eṟibōyuni
kha 1
svadattāṁ paradaṁtāṁ vā yō harēti vasundha rāṁ
ṣaṣṭiva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
. bahubhi¨rvasudhā dattā bahubhiścānupālitā
yesya yesya yedā bhūmistasya tasyatadā phalaṁ

karamucita
ṁbutō nagaragā
ṁḍḍaḍu gaṁjanagā
dyayekka śusthira
magu nādivāra
muna ciṁdamalā
ḍina neṟṟamaṇḍaṁ ḍi
ṁbaraginayaṭṭi kāpa
nakuṁ baṁkajalōcana
maṁḍamāṁbakuṁ dira
mugaṁ buṭṭeṁ gāpaṁ ḍa
vadhīritapāvanināṁ bra
siddhuṁ ḍai . [6 .*] maṟiyunu .
śrīvelanāṁṭi gōṁkanripa
śēkharu śrīkaru siddibēta
vidrāvaṇarāvaṇāṁtaka
parākramu vikramaca
kri bhūritējōvibhavā
bhirāmuṁ ḍagu cōḍana
cakramuṁ golci tatprasā
dāvahalīlaṁ dālcina ma
hātmuṇḍu gāpaṁḍu dha¨rmma
śīlu ḍai . [7 .*] ciramugaṁ dūṁba
ṟuta mahēśvaruniṁ bratiṣṭi
ṁci rajataśailamunā bhā
suramuga guḍi yettiṁce
nu gurumatiyai kāpa
nāyakuṁ ḍatibha
ktini . [8 .*]

tūṁbaṟti dakṣiṇadi
gbhāgamunaṁdu dēvabhō
gamugā niccina polamu
khā00 dakṣiṇamu ceṟvu
dēvaraku nivēdyamunaku
nicce . śrī kāpenāyaku
ṁḍu śrī bhīmēśvaradēvaraku na
khaṁḍava¨rttidīpamuna kiccina
goṟiyalu 55 vīni jēko
ni kommanabōyinikoḍku
Eṟiyabōyuṁḍu tasa
putrānupautraka nityamāne
ṁḍu nēyi diviyakuṁ bōyaṁga
lavāṁḍu . dēviki nivēdya
muna kiccina kha 3 Idēviki
nakhaṁḍava¨rttidīpamuna kicci
na goṟiyalu 55 vīni jēko
ni koḍku sū
tana putrānupau
trikaṁ nitya māneṁḍu nēyi diviya
ku bōyaṁgalavāṁḍu . brahma
purulu kommanabhaṭla dattana
bhaṭla kha 3 sōnabhaṭla kha 3 sū¨ryya
bhaṭla kha 2 prōlebhaṭla kha 2 komare
bhaṭla kha 1 tippanabhaṭla kha 1 kaṁḍe
kha ¨ryyabhaṭla kha 1
maṁḍe ppanabha
ṭla kha 1 kaṁmaḍibhaṭla matru 1 bijja
nabhaṭla kha 2 nāmanabhaṭla kha 1 kāpana
bhaṭla kha 1 kāmanabhaṭla kha 1
Digital edition of SII 10.89 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
